findings.description: The hint "二重サブミット防止" is listed for popupSubmitタグ, but the source contains no mention of double-submit prevention for this tag. The `allowDoubleSubmission` attribute (and double-submit concepts) belong to the downloadSubmit/downloadButton/downloadLink tags only.
findings.source_evidence: popupSubmitタグ属性テーブルにはallowDoubleSubmissionや二重サブミット関連の記述が存在しない。二重サブミット防止属性はdownloadSubmitタグ等にのみ存在する。
